dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses a 1:2 moving average ratio with unspecified periods. Implemented with sma_10 and sma_20 (1:2 ratio). Entry occurs on crossover in direction of trend; exit occurs on opposite crossover (reversal). No fixed stops used per source. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal triggers both long and short positions based on MA crossover direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses a 1:2 moving average ratio with unspecified periods. Implemented with sma_10 and sma_20 (1:2 ratio). Entry occurs on crossover in direction of trend; exit occurs on opposite crossover (reversal). No fixed stops used per source. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as the signal triggers both long and short positions based on MA crossover direction.

source_rule_text: Liquidate the position when the shorter-term moving average crosses the longer-term moving average in the direction opposite to the current position.
